column1: #mapping_set_title: Biomappings (curated slice for HornDB SPEC-11 conformance)

#mapping_set_description: A ~120-row excerpt of the public Biomappings SSSOM export, trimmed to skos:* mapping predicates for the SPEC-11 F9 loader + chaining conformance fixture. Anchored on a real transitive exactMatch chain (APOLLO_SV:00000142 -> IDOMAL:0001040 -> VO:0000002).
